## **2.2.2.I. PI #9**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

The ANSP is progressing with the implementation of the LARA system in order to optimise airspace management and further

enhance the application of FUA principles. LARA is expected to improve civil-military coordination, increase the effective use of reserved and segregated airspace, and support more efficient planning through available airspace structures. The NSA will monitor the implementation and effectiveness of this initiative through regular performance oversight and the review of the relevant environmental performance indicators.
